items.name: 鶉古城

items.subcategory: 史跡（町指定史跡）

en.name_en: Uzura Old Castle
en.description_en: A monument (historic site), an old castle site. It is town-designated as a Historic Site of Ora Town. It is located within the Uzura-shinden area.

en.name_en: Matsumoto Tumulus Cluster, Tumuli Nos. 3, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13 and 20
en.description_en: A monument (historic site), a group of tumuli within a burial mound cluster. It is town-designated as a Historic Site of Ora Town. It is located in the Matsumoto area of Ishiuchi.

items.name: 神谷家文書
items.subcategory: 古文書（町指定重要文化財）

en.name_en: Kamiya Family Documents
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a collection of old documents (komonjo). It is town-designated as an Important Cultural Property of Ora Town. It is held by the Board of Education.
